root_text.an10.199-210:1.1: “Dasahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato puggalo na sevitabbo.
root_text.an10.199-210:1.3: Pāṇātipātī hoti, adinnādāyī hoti, kāmesumicchācārī hoti, musāvādī hoti, pisuṇavāco hoti, pharusavāco hoti, samphappalāpī hoti, abhijjhālu hoti, byāpannacitto hoti, micchādiṭṭhiko hoti—
root_text.an10.199-210:1.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, dasahi dhammehi samannāgato puggalo na sevitabbo.
root_text.an10.199-210:2.1: Dasahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato puggalo sevitabbo.
root_text.an10.199-210:2.3: Pāṇātipātā paṭivirato hoti, adinnādānā paṭivirato hoti, kāmesumicchācārā paṭivirato hoti, musāvādā paṭivirato hoti, pisuṇāya vācāya paṭivirato hoti, pharusāya vācāya paṭivirato hoti, samphappalāpā paṭivirato hoti, anabhijjhālu hoti, abyāpannacitto hoti, sammādiṭṭhiko hoti—
root_text.an10.199-210:2.4: imehi kho, bhikkhave, dasahi dhammehi samannāgato puggalo sevitabbo.
root_text.an10.199-210:3.1: Dasahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato puggalo na bhajitabbo …pe…
root_text.an10.199-210:4.1: Dasahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato puggalo bahuṁ apuññaṁ pasavati …
root_text.an10.199-210:4.4: Pāṇātipātā paṭivirato hoti, adinnādānā paṭivirato hoti, kāmesumicchācārā paṭivirato hoti, musāvādā paṭivirato hoti, pisuṇāya vācāya paṭivirato hoti, pharusāya vācāya paṭivirato hoti, samphappalāpā paṭivirato hoti, anabhijjhālu hoti, abyāpannacitto hoti, sammādiṭṭhiko hoti—
root_text.an10.199-210:4.5: imehi kho, bhikkhave, dasahi dhammehi samannāgato puggalo bahuṁ puññaṁ pasavatī”ti.

translation_text.an10.199-210:1.1: “Mendicants, you should not associate with an individual who has ten qualities.
translation_text.an10.199-210:1.3: They kill living creatures, steal, and commit sexual misconduct. They use speech that’s false, divisive, harsh, or nonsensical. And they’re covetous, malicious, with wrong view.
translation_text.an10.199-210:1.4: You should not associate with an individual who has these ten qualities.
translation_text.an10.199-210:2.1: You should associate with an individual who has ten qualities.
translation_text.an10.199-210:2.3: They don’t kill living creatures, steal, or commit sexual misconduct. They don’t use speech that’s false, divisive, harsh, or nonsensical. They’re contented, kind-hearted, with right view.
translation_text.an10.199-210:2.4: You should associate with an individual who has these ten qualities.”
translation_text.an10.199-210:3.1: “Mendicants, you should not frequent an individual who has ten qualities …
translation_text.an10.199-210:4.1: “An individual who possesses these ten qualities brims with much wickedness. …
translation_text.an10.199-210:4.2: An individual who possesses these ten qualities brims with much merit.
translation_text.an10.199-210:4.4: They don’t kill living creatures, steal, or commit sexual misconduct. They don’t use speech that’s false, divisive, harsh, or nonsensical. They’re contented, kind-hearted, with right view.
translation_text.an10.199-210:4.5: An individual who has these ten qualities creates much merit.”
